label: Active baseline after native handoff tuning
notes: This session is the retained comparison point for the next tuning loop.
Startup stayed low-latency and the stream recovered from FLOW to FULL without any viewer refresh.
Viewer jitter buffer averaged about 40.5 ms, materially lower than the earlier 06:20 and 07:35 retained comparisons.
Native capture stayed healthy with zero queue drops, but renderer backpressure still logged 38 events with 985 stale-frame drops by the end of the run.
The remaining gap is sender-side encoder behavior: after briefly reaching 1600x900 in FULL, outbound resolution drifted to 1200x675 while ABR still reported FULL.
